---
agent: agent
---
Use markdownlint to lint markdown files in this repository. Scan files and then summarize and give me a report of the issues found. If I approve fix them. Attempt to fix them automatically using markdownlint first and only manually fix any remaining issues after that. To concern tokens be very selective about which documents to scan and how much you read. Attempt to use markdownlint's automatic fixing capabilities first before doing any manual fixes. Only fix issues that markdownlint can fix automatically unless I specifically ask you to fix other issues manually.
